Types

BimeraCall = enum
  bcNone, bcExact, bcOneOffMismatch, bcOneOffIndel
BimeraConsensusOptions = object
  minSampleFraction*: float64
  ignoreNNegatives*: int
BimeraDenovoResult = object
  sequences*: seq[string]
  abundances*: seq[int64]
  flags*: seq[bool]
  calls*: seq[BimeraCall]
  nBimeras*: int
  exactBimeraCount*: int
  oneOffMismatchBimeraCount*: int
  oneOffIndelBimeraCount*: int
BimeraMethod = enum
  bmPooled, bmConsensus, bmPerSample
BimeraOptions = object
  minFoldParentOverAbundance*: float64
  minParentAbundance*: int64
  allowOneOff*: bool
  minOneOffParentDistance*: int
  threads*: int
  parallelMinCandidates*: int
BimeraTableResult = object
  sequences*: seq[string]
  presentSamples*: seq[int]
  flaggedSamples*: seq[int]
  flags*: seq[bool]
  calls*: seq[BimeraCall]
  nBimeras*: int
  exactBimeraCount*: int
  oneOffMismatchBimeraCount*: int
  oneOffIndelBimeraCount*: int
RemoveBimeraResult = object
  mode*: BimeraMethod
  inputUniqueCount*: int
  removedUniqueCount*: int
  keptUniqueCount*: int
  pooled*: BimeraDenovoResult
  consensus*: BimeraTableResult
  removed*: seq[SampleSequenceAbundance]
  kept*: seq[SampleSequenceAbundance]
  exactBimeraCount*: int
  oneOffMismatchBimeraCount*: int
  oneOffIndelBimeraCount*: int
SampleSequenceAbundance = object
  sampleId*: string
  sequence*: string
  abundance*: int64
UniqueSequenceAbundance = object
  sequence*: string
  abundance*: int64

Procs

proc defaultBimeraConsensusOptions(): BimeraConsensusOptions {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc defaultBimeraOptions(): BimeraOptions {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc describe(opts: BimeraConsensusOptions): string {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc describe(opts: BimeraOptions): string {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc isBimera(sequence: string; parents: openArray[string]; allowOneOff = false;
              minOneOffParentDistance = 4): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc isBimeraDenovo(uniques: openArray[UniqueSequenceAbundance];
                    opts: BimeraOptions = defaultBimeraOptions()): BimeraDenovoResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, ValueError], tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
proc isBimeraDenovoTable(rows: openArray[SampleSequenceAbundance];
                         bimeraOpts: BimeraOptions = defaultBimeraOptions();
    consensusOpts: BimeraConsensusOptions = defaultBimeraConsensusOptions()): BimeraTableResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
proc removeBimeraDenovo(rows: openArray[SampleSequenceAbundance];
                        mode: BimeraMethod = bmConsensus;
                        bimeraOpts: BimeraOptions = defaultBimeraOptions();
    consensusOpts: BimeraConsensusOptions = defaultBimeraConsensusOptions()): RemoveBimeraResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
proc removeBimeraDenovo(uniques: openArray[UniqueSequenceAbundance];
                        opts: BimeraOptions = defaultBimeraOptions()): seq[
    UniqueSequenceAbundance] {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [TimeEffect],
                               forbids: [].}
proc validateOptions(opts: BimeraConsensusOptions) {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc validateOptions(opts: BimeraOptions) {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc writeSampleSequenceAbundanceTsv(path: string;
                                     rows: openArray[SampleSequenceAbundance]) {.
    ...raises: [IOError], tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
proc writeUniqueSequenceAbundanceTsv(path: string;
                                     rows: openArray[UniqueSequenceAbundance]) {.
    ...raises: [IOError], tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
